ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service provider */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the service provider company */,
  "order_processing_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to process the order */,
  "registered_agent" TEXT /* Cost or indication of registered agent services */,
  "ein_registration_fee" REAL /* Fee for obtaining EIN registration */,
  "operating_agreement_fee" REAL /* Fee for the operating agreement */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the service provider operates */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the service provider operates (if applicable) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the service provider's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the services offered */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the service provider based on user feedback */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders processed by the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "account_created" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the user is registering (if applicable) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the user's business operates in */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_business_account" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is for a business */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider selected for the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., processing, completed, failed) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order including fees */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business being registered */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., LLC, Corporation) */,
  "state_of_incorporation" TEXT /* State where the business is being incorporated */,
  "incorporation_date" TEXT /* Date the business is expected to be incorporated */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery for the incorporation documents (e.g., email, mail) */,
  "documents_provided" TEXT /* List of documents provided by the user */,
  "documents_required" TEXT /* List of documents required by the service provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the reminder */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance task (e.g., annual report, registered agent renewal) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the compliance task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "reminder_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the compliance task */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the reminder (e.g., annual, bi-annual) */,
  "last_completion_date" TEXT /* Date the task was last completed */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Next due date for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reminders_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or transaction ID for the payment */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded, if any */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date when the refund was issued, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the specific service provided (e.g., order processing, documentation) */,
  "compliance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the compliance management service */,
  "customer_service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for customer service */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
